mods.name: Fully Marked Map
mods.author: Moi
mods.description: Adds Koroks/Shrines/Chests and Boss Enemy markers to the Sheikah Slate overworld map textures under specific conditions. Must be zoomed in to maximum level, and must have surrounding areas unlocked from surrounding towers.
